description: Curated 100+ laundry, stain-removal, and booster products for the TidyAI Hacks "Suggested products" section. Each product has verified active ingredients, the stain chemistry classes it works best on, and category tags (popular / eco / fragrance-free / sensitive-skin / etc.) that drive UI filtering.

schema.name: product name as marketed
schema.category: detergent | stain_remover | booster | pet_enzyme | softener | scent_booster | machine_cleaner
schema.format: liquid | powder | sheet | pod | spray | gel | paste | stick | bar | tablet | granular | wipe | ball
schema.best_for: array of chemistry_class values (matches product_ifthen_rules.json + laundry_playbook_v3.json)
schema.description: one-sentence positioning + cult-favorite signal where relevant

products.name: Original Liquid Laundry Detergent
products.description: The #1 US laundry detergent. Multi-enzyme workhorse that handles 90% of everyday stains.

products.name: Original Powder Laundry Detergent
products.description: Powder variant carries more enzymes (incl. lipase) than the liquid. The KismaiAesthetics spa-day favorite.

products.name: Pods Original
products.description: Pre-dosed convenience. Most-bought pod SKU in the US (~250K+ monthly units on Amazon).

products.name: Hygienic Clean Heavy Duty 10X
products.description: Tide's strongest formula. Designed for set stains and heavy soil; high surfactant + enzyme concentration.

products.name: Plus Bleach Alternative
products.description: Color-safe oxygen-bleach detergent. For whites and lights without chlorine bleach risk.

products.name: ProClean Original Power-Liquid
products.description: The 5-enzyme champion. Beats Tide on stain removal by ~2% in independent tests.

products.name: ProClean Power-Pearls Powder
products.description: Powder version with maximum enzyme load. Best for spa-day soaks.

products.name: ProClean Oxi Power-Liquid
products.description: Detergent + built-in oxygen bleach booster. Two products in one bottle.

products.name: Original Scent Liquid
products.description: #2 US-selling detergent. Mid-tier cleaning, top-rated for scent strength.

products.name: Flings Original Scent Pods
products.description: Gain's pod version. Same scent strength as the liquid.

products.name: Plus OxiClean Deep Clean
products.description: Budget workhorse with built-in OxiClean. Strong value pick.

products.name: Mighty Pacs Original
products.description: Affordable pod option. Owned by Henkel (same parent as Persil).

products.name: Bright Clean Color Guard
products.description: Color-protection detergent. Cheaper Woolite Darks alternative.

products.name: Darks Defense Liquid
products.description: Specifically formulated for dark colors. Active dye-magnet keeps blacks black.

products.name: Deep Clean Liquid
products.description: Classic workhorse, mid-tier cleaning. Less premium than Tide/Persil.

products.name: Free & Clear Liquid
products.description: 96% plant-based. NEA-endorsed for eczema. Parents magazine top baby pick.

products.name: EasyDose Ultra-Concentrated
products.description: Concentrated formula with pre-measured dispenser. 66 loads in a small bottle.

products.name: 8X Concentrated Laundry Detergent
products.description: Biodegradable + phosphate-free. Pump bottle, ultra-concentrated 8X formula.

products.name: Clean Day Laundry Detergent
products.description: 88% bio-based. Essential-oil scented (lavender, lemon verbena, basil).

products.name: 2X Liquid Laundry Detergent
products.description: EPA Safer Choice certified. Includes built-in softener (no separate fabric softener needed).

products.name: Sensitive Skin & Baby Pods
products.description: Plastic-free packaging. Subscription model. NEA-endorsed for eczema.

products.name: Laundry Powder
products.description: Cult favorite. Minimalist 3-ingredient formula. Excellent in hard water.

products.name: Laundry Powder
products.description: Cloth-diaper community favorite. Minimalist powder with no enzymes (some diaper users prefer this).

products.name: Platinum Series Active Wear
products.description: Hard-water champion. Cloth-diaper safe. Multi-enzyme plant formula.

products.name: All-Purpose Concentrate
products.description: Multi-use concentrate (1 bottle = 70 cleaner bottles). MADE SAFE certified. Cleanest US ingredient list.

products.name: Laundry Detergent Sheets (Refreshing Mist + Fragrance Free SKUs)
active_ingredients: Protease enzyme (per brand — for sweat, body odor, protein)
Lipase enzyme (per brand — for grease and sebum)
products.description: Sweden-made enzyme-powered sheets. Brand markets protease + lipase activity — strong on sweat, body odor, grease, and activewear funk. Two SKUs: Refreshing Mist (mild fragrance) and Fragrance Free (for sensitive skin, baby clothes, chemical-sensitive households). Plastic-free, dissolves in cold or hot water.

products.name: Fragrance Free Laundry Detergent Sheets
products.description: Same enzyme-powered formula as the standard White Hack sheets but with zero fragrance, dyes, or optical brighteners. Best pick when fragrance-free is required — eczema, baby clothes, asthma-sensitive households.

products.name: Eco Laundry Detergent Sheets
products.description: Cheapest per-load sheet detergent (~$0.20–0.33). B Corp; donates 10 washes per pack.

products.name: Eco-Strips Laundry Detergent
products.description: Pioneer of the sheet format. Paraben-free, phosphate-free, hypoallergenic.

products.name: Detergent Sheets
products.description: EWG Verified, Leaping Bunny, USDA BioPreferred, Mom's Choice. Stain-fighting enzymes.

products.name: Laundry Detergent Sheets
products.description: Independent sheet brand. Solid mid-tier eco option.

products.name: Laundry Detergent Tablets
products.description: Tablet format. Refillable Forever tin. Plastic-free. EPA Safer Choice.

products.name: Detergent Sheets
products.description: US-made budget sheet option.

products.name: Proofed! Laundry Detergent Sheets
products.description: Boutique eco sheet brand.

products.name: Free Clear Liquid
products.description: #1 dermatologist-recommended. NEA + NPF Seals. Eczema gold standard.

products.name: Free & Gentle Liquid
products.description: Tide power without fragrance/dyes. NEA + NPF Seals.

products.name: ProClean Sensitive Skin
products.description: Same 5-enzyme stain power as Persil ProClean, gentler on skin.

products.name: Stage 1: Newborn Liquid
products.description: Formulated for newborn skin. Has a signature soft scent (not fragrance-free).

products.name: Baby Stain Remover
products.description: Gentle enough for baby clothes; strong on formula, blood, poop stains.

products.name: Free + Clear & Gentle Liquid
products.description: Target's house-brand answer to All Free Clear. Solid budget pick.

products.name: Plant-Based Baby Laundry Detergent
products.description: Plant-based baby formula. Pediatrician + dermatologist tested.

products.name: Sensitive Skin Free of Perfumes & Dyes
products.description: Budget sensitive-skin pick. Washing soda base gives mild builder action.

products.name: Sports Detergent (Activewear)
products.description: Oxygen-ion based. Strips body-oil buildup from synthetic athletic fabric.

products.name: Laundry Detergent Free + Clear
products.description: Targets baked-in body odor in synthetic activewear. Strong on the lipid layer where bacteria live.

products.name: Plus Febreze Sport Odor Defense
products.description: Tide formula + Febreze for set workout-clothes smell.

products.name: Sport Max Odor Defense
products.description: Specifically for embedded odors. Used by pro sports teams.

products.name: Enzyme Sports Laundry Detergent
products.description: Fragrance-free athletic enzyme detergent. Made in USA.

products.name: Wash & Stain Bar
products.description: Spot-treat bar safe for silk, wool, cashmere. Hand-wash all-in-one.

products.name: Wool & Cashmere Shampoo
products.description: pH-balanced for animal-protein fibers. No enzymes that degrade keratin.

products.name: Delicate Wash No-Rinse
products.description: No-rinse delicates wash for wool, silk, lingerie. Knitting + lingerie community favorite.

products.name: Soak Wash
products.description: No-rinse formula for delicates. Quilters and lingerie users swear by it.

products.name: Denim Wash
products.description: Made for raw and selvedge denim. Preserves indigo dye without fading.

products.name: Versatile Stain Remover Powder
products.description: The universal oxygen booster. Soak 30 min to overnight for set stains.

products.name: MaxForce Spray
products.description: 3x stronger than original OxiClean. Pre-treat 5 minutes before wash.

products.name: White Revive Powder
products.description: Whiter than chlorine bleach by 40% per OxiClean testing. Heavy optical brightener load.

products.name: Odor Blasters Versatile
products.description: Versatile + targeted odor neutralizer. Strong on gym-funk and musty smells.

products.name: Baby Stain Soaker Powder
products.description: Gentler OxiClean formula. Soak for baby clothes, formula stains, blowouts.

products.name: Advanced Action Gel
products.description: Classic pre-treater. Gel sticks to vertical surfaces during dwell time.

products.name: Triple-Acting Liquid
products.description: Spray pre-treater. Same family as Advanced Gel, faster dwell.

products.name: Wipes (On-the-go)
products.description: Single-use wipes for travel and on-the-spot treatment.

products.name: Max Pre-Treater Stain Spray
products.description: Strong pre-treater. Resolve's laundry sibling of the carpet cleaner.

products.name: Triple Enzyme Stain Remover
products.description: Three-enzyme cocktail. Strong on grass, blood, food grease.

products.name: Resolve Max Stain Remover
products.description: Original pre-treater spray. Older brand, still effective.

products.name: Messy Eater Stain Treater
products.description: TikTok-viral. Especially loved for kid messes. No-scrub, fragrance-free.

products.name: Stain Wizard for All Stains
products.description: Carbona's all-purpose pre-treater. Backup when you can't identify the stain class.

products.name: Stain Devils #1 — Lipstick, Tomato, Liquid Make-up
products.description: Formula #1 — cosmetics + tomato. Most popular numbered Stain Devil.

products.name: Stain Devils #2 — Beverages, Mustard
products.description: Formula #2 — soda, coffee, mustard. Targets tannin + turmeric dye.

products.name: Stain Devils #3 — Ink, Crayon, Marker
products.description: Formula #3 — ink, crayon, marker. Solvent-rich for dye lift.

products.name: Stain Devils #4 — Blood, Dairy, Ice Cream
products.description: Formula #4 — blood, milk, ice cream. Protein specialist.

products.name: Stain Devils #5 — Fat, Cooking Oil, Grease
products.description: Formula #5 — butter, oil, pesto, mayo. Heavy-grease specialist.

products.name: Stain Devils #6 — Glue, Sap, Bubble Gum
products.description: Formula #6 — sticky residues. Citrus-based polymer dissolver.

products.name: Stain Devils #7 — Motor Oil & Lubricant
products.description: Formula #7 — motor oil, grease, asphalt. Workwear specialist.

products.name: Stain Devils #8 — Coffee, Tea, Wine, Juice
products.description: Formula #8 — full tannin set. Wine, coffee, tea, fruit juice, cola.

products.name: Stain Devils #9 — Rust & Perspiration
products.description: Formula #9 — rust + sweat. Mild-acid alternative to Whink.

products.name: Red Wine Stain Remover
products.description: Purpose-built for red wine. Works on coffee and juice too. Strongest natural wine remover.

products.name: Ink & Stain Remover
products.description: Gentler than rubbing alcohol. Safe on acetate/rayon/silk. Cult favorite for Sharpie + ballpoint.

products.name: Rust Stain Remover
products.description: Heavy-duty rust remover. Caustic — wear gloves. Most powerful US rust fabric option.

products.name: Color-Safe Iron Out
products.description: Color-safe alternative to standard Whink. For colored fabric, sunscreen yellowing, and old whites.

products.name: Rust Stain Remover Spray Gel
products.description: Gel sticks to vertical rust stains. Bathroom + fabric + carpet.

products.name: Original Citrus Cleaner
products.description: Citrus solvent. Adhesive, tape residue, gum, sap, tar.

products.name: Heavy-Duty Concentrate
products.description: 1930s formula still made. Crayon-in-dryer disasters, motor oil, deep grease.

products.name: Original Cleaner / Degreaser
products.description: Water-based biodegradable degreaser. Color-fast and fabric-safe.

products.name: Ultra Original Blue Dish Soap
products.description: Universal grease cutter. The single most-recommended stain pre-treater (~$3).

products.name: To Go Stain Remover Pen
products.description: On-the-go spot treatment. Works fresh; not for set stains.

products.name: Professional Strength Stain & Odor Eliminator
products.description: Top-rated pet enzyme cleaner on Amazon. Uricase breaks uric acid crystals.

products.name: Advanced Stain & Odor Eliminator
products.description: The classic. Cult favorite among pet owners. Multiple SKUs (dog, cat, urine destroyer).

products.name: Mister Max Anti-Icky-Poo
products.description: Cat-spray specialist. Recommended for intact tomcats. No ammonia.

products.name: Stain & Odor Solution
products.description: Plant-based enzyme alternative. Strong eco positioning.

products.name: Extreme Pet Stain & Odor Remover
products.description: Budget pet enzyme option. Effective + widely available.

products.name: Instant Carpet Spot Remover
products.description: No-rinse carpet spot remover. Cult favorite for carpet stains of all kinds.

products.name: Pet Carpet Stain Remover
products.description: Pet-specific carpet variant of Resolve.

products.name: Stomp 'N Go Stain Lifter
products.description: Spot treatment for carpets. Step-on-and-leave format.

products.name: Borax Natural Laundry Booster
products.description: pH-raising mineral booster. Stripping recipes, slime, mold, set yellow.

products.name: Super Washing Soda
products.description: Pure sodium carbonate. Hard water softener + heavy-grease booster.

products.name: Stain & Odor Eliminator Powder
products.description: Classic enzyme booster. Add to wash for blood, sweat, food stains.

products.name: Water Softener Powder
products.description: Sequesters hard-water minerals so detergent works better. Essential for hard-water households.

products.name: Booster & Hard Water Treatment
products.description: Pairs with Charlie's Soap for hard-water situations. Eco minimalist option.

products.name: Laundry Additive Powder
products.description: Mineral-based odor neutralizer. No masking fragrance. Smoke + musty + chemical odors.

products.name: Laundry Enhancer Powder
products.description: Sister product to OdorKlenz. Great for chemical-sensitive households.

products.name: Washing Machine Cleaner Tablets
products.description: Treats the machine itself. Monthly cycle prevents musty front-loader smell.

products.name: Original Fabric Softener
products.description: Classic softener. AVOID on towels (kills absorbency) and athletic wear (kills wicking).

products.name: Unstopables In-Wash Scent Booster
products.description: Long-lasting scent. Overdose kills towel absorbency.

products.name: Fireworks In-Wash Scent Booster
products.description: Gain's scent-booster sibling of Downy Unstopables.

products.name: SuperCare Liquid Fabric Softener
products.description: Loved for long-lasting scent. Same caveats as Downy on towels.

products.name: Wool Dryer Balls (set of 6)
products.description: Replaces dryer sheets. Cuts drying time. Eco-friendly + reusable for 1000+ loads.

products.name: Miracle Cleaning Paste
products.description: TikTok-viral paste. Sinks, ovens, glass, mild rust. NOT great for fabric stains.

products.name: Cleanser Powder
products.description: Stainless steel + rust specialist for hard surfaces. NOT for fabric.

products.name: Stain Remover Stick
products.description: Pocket-sized stick. Especially good for deodorant marks and on-the-go.
